languages.text: "Ирлиэт, я не хочу сражаться с твоими сородичами. Попробуй убедить их отступить".
"Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."
languages.original_text: "Ирлиэт, я не хочу сражаться с твоими сородичами. Попробуй убедить их отступить".

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."
"Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."
"Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."
"Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

languages.text: 「イルリエット、貴方の仲間と戦うことは望まない。退却するように説得してくれ。」
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

languages.text: "Yrliet, türünle savaşmak istemiyorum. Onları geri çekilmeye ikna etmeye çalış."
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, türünle savaşmak istemiyorum. Onları geri çekilmeye ikna etmeye çalış."

languages.text: “伊莉耶特，我无意与你的族人交战，劝他们撤退吧。”
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

traits.locale_text: “伊莉耶特，我无意与你的族人交战，劝他们撤退吧。”

languages.text: "Yrliet, ich will nicht gegen Euresgleichen kämpfen. Bringt sie dazu, sich zurückzuziehen."
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, ich will nicht gegen Euresgleichen kämpfen. Bringt sie dazu, sich zurückzuziehen."

languages.text: « Yrliet, je n'ai aucune envie de m'en prendre aux vôtres. Tâchez de les convaincre de battre en retraite. »
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

traits.locale_text: « Yrliet, je n'ai aucune envie de m'en prendre aux vôtres. Tâchez de les convaincre de battre en retraite. »

languages.text: «Yrliet, no quiero luchar contra tu gente. Intenta convencerlos para que se retiren».
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."

traits.locale_text: «Yrliet, no quiero luchar contra tu gente. Intenta convencerlos para que se retiren».
